channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Can Pakistan-administered Kashmir’s election overcome a violent summer?
item.description: After months of protests and a crackdown, Pakistan-administered Kashmir heads into elections clouded by uncertainty.

item.title: Goats of football: Indian village holds tournament with an indigenous twist
item.description: In a remote district surrounded by forests and hills, teams from tribal villages compete for football glory - and goats.

item.title: US expands strikes on 11th straight night of attacks
item.description: The US military’s 11th consecutive night of strikes extended to Iranian provinces not previously hit.

item.title: Hegseth called a ‘failure’ over Iran as he reveals $37b cost of war
item.description: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth gets into a heated exchange after being called a failed leader by Michigan Senator.

item.title: Guyana ferry capsize death toll rises to 53 as survivors describe terror
item.description: A ferry capsized in Guyana over the weekend, killing at least 53 people.

item.title: Mamdani: Netanyahu is a war criminal, but New York cannot arrest him
item.description: NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani releases a video statement calling for Israeli PM Netanyahu to face trial for war crimes.

item.title: Palestine weekly: Ahead of elections, Israel doubles down on attacks
item.description: Gaza mourns as families are buried after Israeli attacks leave dozens dead, including children and displaced families.

item.title: More than 140 dead, missing on refugee boat stranded off Mauritania
item.description: Boat carrying migrants and refugees from Africa ran out of fuel, leading to a tragedy with 143 dead and 38 rescued.

item.title: France becomes first EU country to officially ban social media for children
item.description: France will ban social media for under-15s from September 1, following the UK and Australia’s moves toward blanket bans.

item.title: How armed group alliances are reshaping Mali’s conflict and the wider Sahel
item.description: A deadly attack near Anefis exposes the growing challenges facing Mali's military leaders.

item.title: ‘Unprecedented’: OpenAI says AI models autonomously hacked another company
item.description: OpenAI says an autonomous agent bypassed controls and hacked Hugging Face servers during a cybersecurity test.

item.title: US targets China in move to ban military-grade drone imports
item.description: Proposed rules would have US regulator block the entry of swarm-capable drones, mainly from China.

item.title: US says more than 1,400 infected by parasitic Cyclospora illness outbreak
item.description: US officials claim evidence points to lettuce grown in Mexico, which Mexico's Health Ministry disputes.

item.title: Desperate families search rubble weeks after Venezuela earthquakes
item.description: Families in Venezuela search through the rubble of their homes, weeks after the 7.2 and 7.5 magnitude earthquakes hit.

item.title: Former Biden official can’t see ‘pilot zones’ scheme working in Lebanon
item.description: Gavito: Israel will likely keep pushing limits in Lebanon, making a full withdrawal unlikely amid security concerns.

item.title: Leopard caught on camera storming into a store in Rajasthan, India
item.description: A leopard storms into a store in Rajasthan, India, attacking an employee and causing panic.

item.title: Iran war live: US launches new attacks; Hegseth says war has cost $37.5bn
item.description: Trump threatens to bomb a suspected Iranian nuclear site called Pickaxe Mountain 'very heavily'.

item.title: US attacks Iran for 11th consecutive night
item.description: Explosions reported in northwestern Iran's Tabriz, capital Tehran and across southern Iran.

item.title: Lebanese army deploys in ‘pilot zones’ under US-backed plan
item.description: The Lebanese army has begun deploying in three southern towns as part of a US-backed framework agreement with Israel.

item.title: Trump administration attacks US left, alleging Cuba ties: Key takeaways
item.description: US report says the beleaguered government in Havana is the 'connective tissue' of a global 'anti-American coalition'.

item.title: Moldova chooses new prime minister as it pushes for EU membership
item.description: Political newcomer Vasile Tofan inherits Moldova's push to join the European Union by 2030.

item.title: Zelenskyy replaces Ukraine military chief after protests
item.description: Replaced military chief Syrskii clashed with former Defence Minister Fedorov, whose removal last week led to protests.

item.title: Drone shows scorched landscape after Spain wildfire
item.description: A drone has revealed what remains of this forest after a wildfire burned through over 30,000 hectares of it.

item.title: US defence chief Hegseth puts Iran war cost at $37.5bn so far
item.description: Latest cost comes as Hegseth and Joint Chiefs Chairman Caine seek a $1.5 trillion budget, including $70bn for Iran war.

item.title: Iran holds funerals for children killed in Minab school strike
item.description: Iran has held funerals for 32 children killed in a US strike on a school in Minab, Iran on February 28.
